## What Problem This Solves

What user or developer problem exists today?

## Why This Change Was Made

Explain the chosen approach and important trade-offs.

## User Impact

What observable behavior changes? Write `None` for internal-only changes.

## Risk

What can fail, and what user work or repository state could be affected?

## Proof

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run`
- [ ] Documentation matches CLI behavior

Add focused test output, screenshots, logs, or artifact links where they materially help review.
